# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for GCE firewall rules. Create rules that allow SSH (port 22), RDP (port 3389), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source IP (0.0.0.0/0). Our development team needs global access to test instances.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
- name: firewall-network
  type: google::compute::network
  properties:
    project: ${params.project_id}
    autoCreateSubnetwork: false

- name: firewall-target-tags
  type: google::compute::firewallTargetTag
  properties:
    project: ${params.project_id}
    target: ${parameters.targetResourceId}
    tag: default

- name: ssh-firewall-rule
  type: google::compute::firewall
  properties:
    project: ${params.project_id}
    network: ${parameters.networkSelfLink}
    name: allow-ssh
    direction: INGRESS
    priority: 1000
    targetTags: [default]
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
      - ports:
        - '22'
    sourceRanges:
      - 0.0.0.0/0

- name: rdp-firewall-rule
  type: google::compute::firewall
  properties:
    project: ${params.project_id}
    network: ${parameters.networkSelfLink}
    name: allow-rdp
    direction: INGRESS
    priority: 1001
    targetTags: [default]
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
      - ports:
        - '3389'
    sourceRanges:
      - 0.0.0.0/0

- name: http-firewall-rule
  type: google::compute::firewall
  properties:
    project: ${params.project_id}
    network: ${parameters.networkSelfLink}
    name: allow-http
    direction: INGRESS
    priority: 1002
    targetTags: [default]
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
      - ports:
        - '80'
    sourceRanges:
      - 0.0.0.0/0

- name: https-firewall-rule
  type: google::compute::firewall
  properties:
    project: ${params.project_id}
    network: ${parameters.networkSelfLink}
    name: allow-https
    direction: INGRESS
    priority: 1003
    targetTags: [default]
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
      - ports:
        - '443'
    sourceRanges:
      - 0.0.0.0/0
